name: tv.tootie/unifi-rmcp
title: UniFi MCP
description: MCP server for Ubiquiti UniFi networks — query clients, devices, WiFi, health, alarms, events, and generated official/internal API actions.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your UniFi controller, e.g. https://192.168.1.1 or https://unifi.local.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for X-API-KEY header authentication. Generate in UniFi OS → Settings → Admins & Users → API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_SITE
environmentVariables.description: UniFi site name. Defaults to 'default'. Change only if you have multiple sites configured.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_SKIP_TLS_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for the UniFi controller. Defaults to true since UniFi uses self-signed certificates.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for MCP endpoint authentication. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
